seoDescription: Luc Rousseau's resume as a Founding Engineer: product, architecture and end-to-end delivery for early-stage startups. 26 years of engineering, studio and technical leadership. Quebec and remote.
tagline: First or second senior hire (pre-seed to Series A): product, architecture and delivery, from roadmap to code.

summary.title: Profile
summary.content:
Founding Engineer: I build the product end to end while the team is still small (pre-seed to Series A). Architecture, prioritization, code, and a bit of design. One senior person owning the thread through delivery.

26 years of engineering, a studio I ran (Strong), mandates where I carried both tech and product (Milesopedia, nesto, comparemortgages). Self-taught, I ramp on stacks fast and decide fast. What I'm looking for: an early-stage where that breadth is an advantage, not a blur.

items.label: from brief to product in production
small team, broad scope, fast shipping

items.title: End-to-end ownership
items.content: From the "why" to "shipped": prioritization, architecture, code and delivery, no handoff.

items.title: Realistic speed
items.content: Pragmatic calls, controlled debt, scope that holds. Ship fast without building a monster.

items.title: Useful breadth
items.content: Product, front, back, a bit of design: I fill the gaps while the team is small.

items.title: Studio founder
items.content: 6 years running Strong: clients, delivery, team. I know what it costs to build.

items.summary: Technical and product partner for growing and early-stage teams: clarity, architecture and delivery.
bullets: Own the product from roadmap to code: prioritization, architecture, delivery.
Decoupled architectures (React/Next.js, Laravel, APIs, headless) sized for a small team.
Cut debt and stabilize velocity without overengineering.
A bit of design and a lot of pragmatism: ship what matters.
items.stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Laravel, PHP, REST APIs, CI/CD, Git

items.progression: Internal progression: senior full stack developer → Product Manager → Product Lead
items.summary: Multi-brand network; from code to product leadership.
bullets: 0 → 1: request-management program on a headless CMS, multi-brand (Canada and France).
Real-time React dashboards; built processes and systems, user-data management.
Prioritize, align content and engineering, ship with a small team (3 devs, 1 DevOps consultant).
Steered strategic projects aligned with long-term goals; cleared friction so a small team could move fast.
Integration and deployment into existing ecosystems; end-to-end delivery.
items.stack: React, headless WordPress, PHP, REST APIs, CI/CD

items.summary: Mortgage analysis and comparison platform (0 → product).
bullets: System architecture and phased planning through delivery.
Coordination across design, back-end and front-end; UI prototypes with designers.
A/B and data tooling to iterate fast after launch.
items.stack: React, PHP, Laravel, GraphQL, REST, A/B testing

items.summary: Online mortgage lender, Canadian fintech ($302M Series E, $1.47B valuation).
bullets: Centralized architecture shared across every project; adaptable grid per initiative.
Mentoring of one developer; recruiting, code reviews and technical guidance.
Always hands-on on critical code; monitoring and continuous optimization.
items.stack: React, Vue.js, PHP, Laravel, GraphQL, REST, architecture

items.summary: Custom web development studio: clients, team, delivery.
bullets: Built and ran the studio for 6 years: acquisition, delivery, quality.
Full stack development (React, Laravel, PHP) and technical direction.

items.summary: Custom websites and web applications for SMEs and agencies.

items.role: Art director, head of the interactive department
bullets: Creative direction and ownership of the interactive department.
